data.body:
PASS-1 review (T8 — LLM/prompt structural-completeness overlay): CLEAN, no findings.

This is a documentation-only plan that describes EXISTING reuse machinery; it does not define a new LLM reviewer, output schema, enum vocabulary, processing protocol, counter, or fallback. The overlay still applies (it references enums/protocols/schemas an executor relies on), so I tool-verified every referenced symbol resolves and is fully specified in current source:

- Signing surface — all named functions exist and are fully specified: `sign_manifest` (signing.py:319), `verify_signature` (:362), `verify_record` (:208), `signing_key` (:79), `key_fingerprint` (:151), `compute_signature` (:202), `parse_manifest` (:161), `head_sha` (:298). The verdict vocabulary `certified|mismatch|foreign_key|unsigned` is grounded in source AND the packaged schema enum (verify_signature_result.schema.json:17) — no undefined-but-referenced enum.
- LLM runtime — `Runner` protocol with `run`/`preflight` (runner.py:71), all `RunRequest` fields incl. `mode` (findings|structured|text), `execution_mode`, `output_schema`, `extra_tools` (:28), `get_runner` (:236), `run_workflow` (workflow/executor.py:584) all present.
- Prompt/contract model — `get_prompt` (prompts.py:173), `resolve_prompt` (:648), and the CLOSED `execution_mode` enum `EXECUTION_MODES` (prompts.py:39+, validated at :206) all present and fully specified.
- Output-schema seam — `validate_structured` (findings.py:247) present; packaged JSON Schemas present.

Structural-gap checklist all pass: no referenced enum whose value vocabulary is undefined; no decision-rule separated from its schema; no ambiguous counter/state increment; no sub-step needing an unspecified fallback; no instruction-locality / pink-elephant antipattern. AC-7 (signatures verified against current source, no drift) further closes the only real T8-adjacent risk for a reference doc.

Affirmations (T8): every referenced agent/skill/enum/protocol/schema exists and is fully specified (tool-verified); closed enums (verdict vocabulary, execution_mode) are co-located with their validators in source; no structural under-specification for this overlay.
